immediate_actions.step: Encourage coughing if person can still cough (mild obstruction)
immediate_actions.note: Do not intervene if they can cough forcefully

immediate_actions.step: Call 911 if person cannot breathe, cough, or speak (severe obstruction)
Ask for consent if patient is conscious: 'I know first aid — are you okay with me helping you?'
immediate_actions.note: Proceed if they consent, nod, or cannot respond. Do not touch if they refuse.

immediate_actions.step: 5 firm back blows between shoulder blades with heel of hand
5 abdominal thrusts: fist above navel, quick upward-inward thrusts
Check mouth after each cycle — remove only visible objects

next_steps.step: Lower to ground and start CPR if person loses consciousness

next_steps.when: after object clears — abdominal thrusts can cause internal injury
